messages.subject: [R-sig-networks] Transformation of J48 Decision Tree into Newick Tree
messages.subject_clean: Transformation of J48 Decision Tree into Newick Tree
messages.body_plain:
I have the following J48 decision tree (res):

   >  res
    J48 pruned tree

Petal.Width <= 0.6: setosa (50.0)
Petal.Width > 0.6
| Petal.Width <= 1.7
| | Petal.Length <= 4.9: versicolor (48.0/1.0)
| | Petal.Length > 4.9
| | | Petal.Width <= 1.5: virginica (3.0)
| | | Petal.Width > 1.5: versicolor (3.0/1.0)
| Petal.Width > 1.7: virginica (46.0/1.0)

Number of Leaves : 5

Size of the tree : 9

It was created in R as followed:
library(RWeka)
data(iris)
res = J48(Species ~., data = iris)

I would like to transform it to Newick tree using data.tree.
